mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID, STOCK_NAME, TRADE_CATEGORY, TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_COUNT, STOCK_PRICE, AFTER_BALANCE, TRADE_DATE FROM TRADE_HISTORIES JOIN STOCKS ON TRADE_HISTORIES.STOCK_ID = STOCKS.STOCK_ID WHERE USER_ID = #{value} ORDER BY TRADE_DATE DESC
SELECT TRADE_CATEGORY, TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_COUNT, STOCK_PRICE, TRADE_DATE FROM TRADE_HISTORIES WHERE STOCK_ID = #{value} ORDER BY TRADE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRADE_HISTORIES ( TRADE_ID, USER_ID, STOCK_ID, TRADE_CATEGORY, TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_COUNT, STOCK_PRICE, AFTER_BALANCE, TRADE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TRADE_ID.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{stockId}, #{tradeCategory}, #{totalTradePrice}, #{tradeCount}, #{stockPrice}, #{afterBalance}, SYSDATE )
